restrictions.outwardHtml:
Valid on Great Western Railway (GWR) services as stated on the ticket, ONLY for journeys from GWR stations to London Paddington. (As per GWR Restriction code QS).

Also Valid in standard class on ALL Heathrow Express (HEX) services on the date reserved for journeys between London Paddington and Heathrow Airport (All terminals as per restriction HQ).
restrictions.outwardText:
Valid on Great Western Railway (GWR) services as stated on the ticket, ONLY for journeys from GWR stations to London Paddington. (As per GWR Restriction code QS).
 Also Valid in standard class on ALL Heathrow Express (HEX) services on the date reserved for journeys between London Paddington and Heathrow Airport (All terminals as per restriction HQ).
restrictions.returnHtml:
Valid in standard class on ALL Heathrow Express (HEX) services on the date reserved for journeys between Heathrow Airport (All terminals as per restriction HQ) and London Paddington.  

Also Valid on Great Western Railway (GWR) services as stated on the ticket, ONLY for journeys from GWR stations from London Paddington. (As per GWR Restriction code QS).
restrictions.returnText:
Valid in standard class on ALL Heathrow Express (HEX) services on the date reserved for journeys between Heathrow Airport (All terminals as per restriction HQ) and London Paddington.  
 Also Valid on Great Western Railway (GWR) services as stated on the ticket, ONLY for journeys from GWR stations from London Paddington. (As per GWR Restriction code QS).

restrictions.outwardHtml:
Not valid on trains timed to arrive London Terminals after 04:29 and before 10:00.

Not valid on services timed to depart:

  • stations within London Zones 1-6 after 04:29 and before 09:30 (except on any South Western Railway service to connect in with the services shown in the Seasonal Variations below);
  • London Terminals (except Euston, Kings Cross, Liverpool Street, Paddington, St Pancras International or Waterloo) after 04:29 and before 09:30;
  • Vauxhall after 04:29 and before 09:03 and after 16:03 and before 19:05;
  • Clapham Junction after 04:29 and before 09:09 and after 16:06 and before 19:10;
  • London Euston after 04:29 and before 08:45 and after 16:44 and before 19:01;
  • London Kings Cross after 04:29 and before 09:00 and after 16:29 and before 19:02;
  • London Liverpool Street after 04:29 and before 09:30 and after 16:28 and before 18:35;
  • London Paddington after 04:29 and before 09:30 and after 15:59 and before 19:00;
  • London St Pancras International after 04:29 and before 09:00 and after 16:29 and before 19:02;
  • London Waterloo after 04:29 and before 09:00 and after 15:59 and before 19:01;
  • Stratford (London) after 04:29 and before 09:38 and after 16:35 and before 18:42;
  • Cowes East or Cowes West on Red Funnel ferry services after 04:29 and before 09:14.
  • CrossCountry services timed to depart after 04:29 and before 08:45.
restrictions.returnHtml:
Not valid on trains timed to arrive London Terminals after 04:29 and before 10:00.

Not valid on services timed to depart:

  • stations within London Zones 1-6 after 04:29 and before 09:30 (except on any South Western Railway service to connect in with the services shown in the Seasonal Variations below);
  • London Terminals (except Euston, Kings Cross, Liverpool Street, Paddington, St Pancras International or Waterloo) after 04:29 and before 09:30;
  • Vauxhall after 04:29 and before 09:03 and after 16:03 and before 19:05;
  • Clapham Junction after 04:29 and before 09:09 and after 16:06 and before 19:10;
  • London Euston after 04:29 and before 08:45 and after 16:44 and before 19:01;
  • London Kings Cross after 04:29 and before 09:00 and after 16:29 and before 19:02;
  • London Liverpool Street after 04:29 and before 09:30 and after 16:28 and before 18:35;
  • London Paddington after 04:29 and before 09:30 and after 15:59 and before 19:00;
  • London St Pancras International after 04:29 and before 09:00 and after 16:29 and before 19:02;
  • London Waterloo after 04:29 and before 09:00 and after 15:59 and before 19:01;
  • Stratford (London) after 04:29 and before 09:38 and after 16:35 and before 18:42;
  • Cowes East or Cowes West on Red Funnel ferry services after 04:29 and before 09:14.
  • CrossCountry services timed to depart after 04:29 and before 08:45.

  • Vauxhall after 04:29 and before 09:03 and after 16:03 and before 19:05;

restrictions.outwardHtml:
Not valid on trains timed to arrive at London Euston after 04:29 and before 10:00.

Not valid on any other journeys timed to depart after 04:29 and before 08:45.

Break of journey is not permitted on the outward portion except to change trains at an intermediate station or to access station facilities.
restrictions.outwardText:
Not valid on trains timed to arrive at London Euston after 04:29 and before 10:00.
 Not valid on any other journeys timed to depart after 04:29 and before 08:45.
 Break of journey is not permitted on the outward portion except to change trains at an intermediate station or to access station facilities.
restrictions.returnHtml:
Return travel from London Euston is not valid before 08:45.

Return travel not valid on trains timed to arrive at London Euston after 04:29 and before 10:00.

Normal break of journey rules apply to the return portion.
restrictions.returnText:
Return travel from London Euston is not valid before 08:45.
 Return travel not valid on trains timed to arrive at London Euston after 04:29 and before 10:00.
 Normal break of journey rules apply to the return portion.
